g.title: Build primary/default table + table map (including virtual join/union context)
Build optimization plan and optimization metadata context
Resolve dimensions/measures + aliases + expressions
Convert filters to dialect-aware criterion terms
Apply plan: dedup/binning/rounding and related metadata
Apply GROUP BY and ORDER BY
Apply DISTINCT logic when requested
Apply frontend-provided max row budget strategies
Apply random/sample strategy and limit/offset
If query_mode=cdf, build CDF SQL via build_cdf_sql
Build union SQL for virtual table union mode
